notes: Adds a blinking VCR-style clock to the main menu with manual clock controls in Settings.
Adds retro playback OSD flashes for input labels, play/pause, FF/REW, channel labels, and no-signal screens.
Adds a simple sleep timer and OTA last-channel recall.
Removes the packaged-app Quit option and menu control hints for a cleaner VCR front screen.
Shows the firmware update splash again while keeping tty1 blank underneath it.
